name: tubedigest
description: Summarize YouTube videos from accessible captions without downloading video media.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @tubedigest/server" "npm run dev -w @tubedigest/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tubedigest/server && npm run build -w @tubedigest/client
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tubedigest/server && npm run test -w @tubedigest/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tubedigest/server && npm run typecheck -w @tubedigest/client
